description: Inventory of all 8 distinct paths that can stamp status:Done and/or persist completion_commit. Used as the safety-net fixture for Phase 1 characterization tests (R-AFCC-DEEP-1B) before any deletion or refactor.

evidence_sources.description: completion_commit: field present in frontmatter and valid via normalizeCompletionCommitField (hex SHA 7-40 chars, any quote-form stripped)
completion_commit_inferred: field present AND gitCommitExists() returns true, OR findMatchingCommit() locates a commit referencing ticket id/r_code via git-log scan
Neither field present, git-log scan returns null

sha_quote_forms.label: bare-short
sha_quote_forms.description: Unquoted 8-hex short SHA. Written by autoFillCompletionCommit via upsertFrontmatterField.

sha_quote_forms.label: double-quoted-short
sha_quote_forms.description: Double-quoted short SHA. Codex tool-call natural form for short refs.

sha_quote_forms.label: double-quoted-full
sha_quote_forms.description: Double-quoted 40-hex full SHA. Most common codex tool-call form; caused R-CCQF live incident (session 2026-05-23-48e6309a, ticket 26301c6a).

sha_quote_forms.label: single-quoted-full
sha_quote_forms.description: Single-quoted 40-hex full SHA. Human-edit natural form.

paths.label: worker-explicit-stamp
paths.description: Worker successfully exits. runWorkerGate returns completionCommitSha. updateTicketFrontmatter writes status:Done + completion_commit:<sha> in one atomic frontmatter write.

expected_end_state.notes: completion_commit written as bare short SHA (form 1) by updateTicketFrontmatter fallback to getHeadSha when completionCommitSha is null

known_failure_modes: R-WUWC: completionCommitSha is null AND getHeadSha fails — completion_commit ends up null, watcher reverts
fsync race: autoFillCompletionCommit (path 2) runs concurrently and reads stale file before path 1 write flushes

paths.label: worker-autofill-belt-and-suspenders
paths.description: Belt-and-suspenders call after path 1. If completion_commit already present: action='already_present', no-op. If absent: reads hasCompletionCommit (inferred scan), writes completion_commit via upsertFrontmatterField, then calls stageTicketFile (git add). Runs only when isSuccess=true.

aabbccdd/linear_ticket_aabbccdd.md.notes: completion_commit field ABSENT — simulates path 1 write failure or belt-and-suspenders scenario

git_preconditions: At least one commit in working_dir whose message contains 'aabbccdd' made since start_time_epoch

known_failure_modes: R-AFCC-STAGE: stageTicketFile calls git add which throws outside a git repo — swallows action='filled' signal
R-CCQF: bare readFrontmatterField used for already-present check (line 53) instead of normalizeCompletionCommitField — quoted SHA treated as absent, triggers spurious re-fill

paths.label: manager-drift-auto-completion-validation
paths.description: Manager detects drift: previous ticket was In Progress but model changed current_ticket without protocol. Calls guardCompletionCommitBeforeDone with allow_inferred_completion_commit:true, then markTicketDone, then autoFillCompletionCommit (post-markTicketDone, since autoFill requires status=Done).

aabbccdd/linear_ticket_aabbccdd.md.notes: This is the previousTicket; model drifted away from it without marking Done

runtime_preconditions: normalizedStatus of aabbccdd is NOT 'done' (In Progress) — triggers drift branch at 4712

expected_end_state.notes: markTicketDone flips to Done, then autoFillCompletionCommit writes completion_commit

known_failure_modes: R-CCRC-2: applyAutoTicketCompletionValidation NOT routed through guard before markTicketDone — re-opens silent Done-without-commit class
R-PEDC: clearStaleDoneWithoutCommitEvidence not called after guard.ok — stale exit_reason persists

paths.label: process-task-completed-guard
paths.description: EPIC_COMPLETED token emitted by manager. classifyCompletion maps EPIC_COMPLETED -> 'task_completed'. processCompletionBranch routes to processTaskCompleted. Guard called without allow_inferred flag; markTicketDone called. No autoFillCompletionCommit follows this path.

aabbccdd/linear_ticket_aabbccdd.md.notes: completion_commit already present — guard will pass immediately

runtime_preconditions: classifyCompletion returns 'task_completed' (EPIC_COMPLETED token present in assistant content)
processCompletionBranch called via processIterationOutcome (exported test path)

expected_end_state.notes: No autoFillCompletionCommit called — completion_commit must be present before this path fires cleanly

known_failure_modes: R-CCQF: quoted SHA in completion_commit field fails normalizeCompletionCommitField check — guard classifies as absent, exits with done_without_commit_evidence

paths.label: runMuxRunnerMain-direct-guard-calls
paths.description: Three direct guardCompletionCommitBeforeDone call sites in the runMuxRunnerMain loop. All require explicit evidence (no allow_inferred flag). See callsites sub-entries for per-site fixture.

callsites.trigger: Worker-self-attested Done detected at ticket boundary
callsites.description: Outer loop detects that previousTicket status is already 'done' after iteration (worker stamped Done itself via prompt-driven validation). Guard validates completion_commit evidence. If guard passes, clearStaleDoneWithoutCommitEvidence. NO markTicketDone call (ticket already Done).

runtime_preconditions: normalizedStatus of aabbccdd is 'done' — triggers guard-only branch at 4691

expected_end_state.notes: status unchanged (already Done); guard validates evidence; clearStaleDoneWithoutCommitEvidence runs

callsites.description: Manager emits EPIC_COMPLETED with pending tickets. evaluateEpicCompletion returns recover_advance. current_ticket is already Done. Guard validates evidence at 5083, then markTicketDone at 5099. No autoFillCompletionCommit.

callsites.trigger: Genuine EPIC_COMPLETED, final ticket Done stamp
callsites.description: Manager emits EPIC_COMPLETED and evaluateEpicCompletion returns genuine. current_ticket needs final Done stamp. Guard validates at 5159, markTicketDone at 5176. No autoFillCompletionCommit. clearStaleDoneWithoutCommitEvidence at 5175.

expected_end_state.notes: markTicketDone at 5176; clearStaleDoneWithoutCommitEvidence at 5175; no autoFill

known_failure_modes: R-CCRC-2: any of the three callsites bypassed — Done flip without guard check, completion_commit can be absent
R-PEDC: clearStaleDoneWithoutCommitEvidence missing after guard.ok — stale exit_reason persists into finalizePipeline

paths.label: phantom-done-watcher-revert
paths.description: Watcher scans Done tickets. For each: checks hasCompletionCommit. If evidence.source='inferred' -> skip (keep). Calls phantomDoneShouldKeepDone. If keepDone=false AND evidence.source='absent' -> writeTicketStatus('Todo'). This is the REVERT path (Done -> Todo).

aabbccdd/linear_ticket_aabbccdd.md.notes: completion_commit ABSENT; completion_commit_inferred ABSENT; no matching git commit

runtime_preconditions: correctPhantomDoneTickets called with { sessionDir, workingDir, iteration }
No operator bypass flag set (state.flags.allow_inferred_completion_commit not set)

known_failure_modes: R-RIC-EXPLICIT-4: explicit SHA present but gitCommitExists check skipped — explicit branch falls through to reachability probe which incorrectly reverts a valid Done
R-AFCC-STALE: start_time_epoch not passed — findMatchingCommit scans all commits, finds cross-session SHA, keeps ticket Done when it should revert

paths.label: phantom-done-watcher-backfill
paths.description: Watcher inspects single Done ticket file. If completion_commit absent but git-log finds inferred SHA: writes completion_commit_inferred:<sha> via insertCompletionCommitField. If no SHA found: reverts status to priorStatus. Two sub-outcomes: backfilled (reason='backfilled') or reverted (reason='reverted').
known_failure_modes: Paths 2 and 7 are functionally identical inferred-backfill helpers separated only by field name (completion_commit vs completion_commit_inferred) — invariant divergence risk
insertCompletionCommitField returns null if completion_commit already present — but inspectPhantomDoneTicketFile already checked for explicit field at line 1101, so this is a race condition only

paths.label: operator-salvage-edit
paths.description: Operator manually edits linear_ticket_*.md frontmatter to add completion_commit:<sha>. Documented bypass path. After edit, watcher (correctPhantomDoneTickets or inspectPhantomDoneTicketFile) sees explicit evidence and keeps ticket Done. No code path in the runtime triggers this — purely an operator action.

aabbccdd/linear_ticket_aabbccdd.md.notes: Operator manually added completion_commit field after ticket was reverted or stalled

preconditions: completion_commit written in one of the 4 SHA quote-forms

expected_end_state.notes: correctPhantomDoneTickets: hasCompletionCommit returns explicit -> skip (no revert). inspectPhantomDoneTicketFile: explicit field present -> returns { changed: false, reason: 'has_completion_commit' }.

known_failure_modes: R-CCQF: operator writes quoted SHA (e.g. "abc1234") — if normalizeCompletionCommitField not used, bare readFrontmatterField returns quoted string, SHA validation fails, classified as absent
